title: Permits
description: A simple mod that brings Hermitcraft-inspired shopping permits to your SMP!
body:
# Permits for Fabric
Bring Hermitcraft-style permits into your Minecraft world! Perfect for SMPs, this mod adds a fun, flexible system for managing permits.

## Features
- Quick setup via `/permit` command
- Non-craftable, controlled distribution
- Four tiers, including a fun secret tier (don't tell anyone!)
- Dynamic tooltips for easy info at a glance
- Support for multiple items per permit
- Custom names and rarities
- You can even wear them on your head!


## Planned Additions
- Permit Collectives
